revision_note: v1.0 revised per owner review (docs/review/comments.md): closed candidate universe added; eligibility status mapping frozen; sec.10/sec.11/sec.7-B corrected; binding extended with census hash, EOL forms, full commit IDs + tree hashes.
authorization_basis: docs/review/comments.md — Disposition A; conditional-coverage fallback rule; total eligibility decision table; four review corrections.

P4_initial_draft.note: superseded by the review-amendment commit; the revised draft+manifest are bound by content hash above and the amendment commit is recorded in git history.

superseded_authority.supersession_scope: forward-only, successor DESIGN only (see adjudication sec.2, sec.10); the prior authority is preserved unchanged and is not retroactively validated.

marginal_count_correction.note: 50/58 from the non-authoritative MR002_ComplementaryCoverage.json (owner ruling 2026-07-14 sec.5). Ranking robust; 5/51/59 used throughout.

closed_candidate_universe.clarabel_disposition: ELIMINATED on the primary criterion (rescues 4/5, U=1) despite the lowest standalone count (29); ALSO inadmissible (invalid conic dual mapping under 1/sqrt(t)).

eligibility_status_mapping.registered_numerical_mapping: exact class ValueError + exact message 'constraints are inconsistent, no solution' -> QUADPROG_CONSTRAINTS_INCONSISTENT -> NUMERICAL_STATUS_NONQUALIFICATION -> invoke PIQP_P2 once
eligibility_status_mapping.future_row_semantics: fallback-eligible is NOT evidence of feasibility; feasibility established by fallback + common certifier; no substring matching; no eligibility by analogy

failures_are_numerical_not_economic.primary_outcome_on_all_5_FQ: ValueError: constraints are inconsistent, no solution
failures_are_numerical_not_economic.conclusion: false-infeasibility (numerical), not economic infeasibility; scoped to these 5 rows only

predicate.rules: exact as_integer_ratio inputs, outward-rounded >=100-digit intervals, NO max(Gamma,0), NO cushion, NO KKT-to-objective conversion

frozen_config.primary: QUADPROG_SQRT (active-set quadprog under z=diag(sqrt(t)) v; S^T H S = 2I exactly)
frozen_config.fallback: PIQP_P2 (proximal interior-point; mr002_piqp.py BASE settings; preconditioner_scale_cost=true; fresh solver per instance; no warm start)
frozen_config.cascade: QUADPROG_SQRT -> (eligible numerical nonqualification per the frozen status mapping) -> PIQP_P2 once; both-fail -> UNRESOLVED_NUMERICAL_FAILURE -> STOP; no third attempt / jitter / tolerance change / row-specific routing

quarantine_non_reuse.reuse: PROHIBITED for primary/fallback/eligibility/certificate/population/threshold; clean successor rerun regenerates all evidence anew.
quarantine_non_reuse.future_unresolved_set: unknown until executed; NOT asserted zero; the quarantined 3839/3839 is inadmissible.

authorization_boundary.execution: CLOSED — requires a SEPARATE execution countersignature binding the finalized implementation, eligibility fixtures, source manifest, image digest, runtime configuration, and clean-run protocol (adjudication sec.10)
not_authorized: any Stage-3 execution before a separate execution countersignature
